hero.subtitle: A Nuance Beyond Time
hero.title: Expressing Emotions Through Music
hero.description: Blending classical piano discipline with a contemporary interpretation. She presents music not merely as an auditory experience, but as an expressive space that touches the soul.

bio.title: A Disciplined Quest for Beauty
content: Every note is not just a sound; it is a journey reaching beyond time.

archive.subtitle: Refined Selections
archive.title: REPERTOIRE
archive.description: Works that transcend time, the pure product of discipline and serenity. You are invited to re-experience these meticulously crafted nuances.

videoDescriptions.cy7JfxykoU0:
Dancing Queen” is one of the timeless Europop songs by the Swedish group ABBA, released in 1976 as the lead single from their album Arrival. 🎵

Written by: Benny Anderson / Björn Ulvaeus / Stig Anderson
Produced by: Benny Anderson / Björn Ulvaeus
Piano Cover by: Francesco Parrino
Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
Lyrics & Music: Benny Anderson / Björn Ulvaeus / Stig Anderson
Produced by: Benny Anderson / Björn Ulvaeus
Arranged by: Francesco Parrino
Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce

🎹 Steinway&Sons B211
videoDescriptions.Qf6FQ6etx1c:
Arranged by Wilhelm Kempff (1895-1991). He was a German pianist, teacher and composer. His student “İdil Biret” has recorded a CD of his piano works.

Piece: Minuet in G Minor
Composed by: George Frideric Handel
Arranged by: Wilhelm Kempff
Painting by: Arzu Yazıcı
Art Gallery: Lucafineart
Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
Eser: Minuet in G Minor
Composer: George Frideric Handel
Arranged by: Wilhelm Kempff
Painting by: Arzu Yazıcı
Art Gallery: Lucafineart
Video Kayıt ve Post Prodüksiyon: Ekin Yüce

🎹Steinway&Sons B211

videoDescriptions.ASntA35VY-c:
“My Heart Will Go On” is recorded by Celine Dion and is the main theme song of the 1997 blockbuster film “Titanic”. The song became Dion’s biggest hit and is considered to be her signature song.

Patrik Pietschmann

Composed by: James Horner
Pianocover: Katherine Cordova(intro)
Artistic Print: Lucafineart

Asturias is a musical work by the Spanish composer and pianist Isaac Albeniz( 1860-1909).It was originally written for the piano and is the most frequently performed work of Albeniz.

choices.subtitle: Collective Interpretation
choices.title: YOU DETERMINE THE NEXT PIECE
choices.description: Music is a language that grows and becomes universal as it is shared. Every timbre you hear on this page is an echo of this journey taken together.
choices.toast: Your nuanced preference has been refinedly recorded. Thank you for your participation.

request.subtitle: Curation Invitation
request.title: A New Nuance to Fill the Silence
request.description: Capturing the right resonance is a matter of professional devotion. Shape this timeless archive by sharing that unique timbre waiting to be discovered.
request.quote: "A disciplined quest is the only path to the true beauty of the moment."
request.toast: Your valuable nuance has been included in the curation process.
request.fulfilledDescription: Works shaped with care, discipline, and joy.

fulfilledItems.title: Down By The River / Baldur’s Gate 3

footer.copyright: © 2026 Müjde Doenyas. A Resonance Beyond Time.

seo.title: Müjde Doenyas | Piano Covers & Classical Music
seo.description: Breathtaking acoustic piano covers of classical pieces, epic film soundtracks, and timeless pop songs by Müjde Doenyas.

pdp.subscribeDesc: You can subscribe to our YouTube channel to join our musical journey and be among the first to watch new recordings and performances.
